    # via jupyter-server
werkzeug==3.1.3
    # via
    #   flask
    #   flask-cors
    #   flask-restx
wheel==0.45.1
    # via pip-tools
widgetsnbextension==4.0.14
    # via ipywidgets
xlsxwriter==3.2.5
    # via -r requirements.in
yarl==1.20.1
    # via aiohttp
zipp==3.23.0
    # via importlib-metadata
zstandard==0.24.0
    # via langsmith

# The following packages are considered to be unsafe in a requirements file:
# pip
# setuptools
